description: Training Records Manager — manages recurrent training schedules, completion records, initial training programs, and regulatory training requirements

hard_stops.label: Recurrent Training Overdue
hard_stops.logic: A crew member's recurrent training is past due — cannot serve in their crew position per 14 CFR 135.351

hard_stops.label: Initial Training Incomplete
hard_stops.logic: A crew member is operating without completing required initial or transition training per 14 CFR 135.339

hard_stops.label: Training Record Not Found
hard_stops.logic: No training record exists for a crew member who is assigned to operational duties — cannot verify compliance

soft_flags.label: Recurrent Due Within 60 Days
soft_flags.logic: A crew member's recurrent training is due within 60 days — schedule training event

soft_flags.label: Training Instructor Not Qualified
soft_flags.logic: An instructor assigned to a training event does not hold the required qualifications for that training module

soft_flags.label: Training Record Incomplete Fields
soft_flags.logic: A training completion record is missing required fields (scores, instructor signature, completion date)
